expected_path_note: SC1=N (no exec role) -> SC2=Y -> SC3=Y (40%) -> set_flag -> final=N -> siap
name: Synthetic Construction Partner 03 – Forty Percent Owner Of South Sudan Roads Contractor
activities: Amira Khalaf holds a 40% shareholding in Nile Route Construction FZE, per the shareholder register. The company grades and paves national trunk roads in South Sudan under contracts with the central Ministry of Roads and Bridges in Juba, which its accounts show as the source of approximately 80% of turnover. Ms Khalaf sits neither on the board nor in management; her involvement is limited to the shareholding, which she holds today.
origin_of_assets: Inherited capital, partly invested into the shareholding in Nile Route Construction FZE.

total_assets.remarks_total_assets: The stake in Nile Route Construction FZE is the largest single asset.
